asset.title: App Manual Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The preview clearly demonstrates a manual variance edit in a financial spreadsheet, showing the corresponding version bump and trace log update.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates manual cell entry and the resulting trace log update.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the spreadsheet before the edit, the edit entry, and the updated state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed spreadsheet UI, though the edit transition is instantaneous.

consistency.evidence: Integrates spreadsheet cells, versioning, and room trace updates.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state synchronization.

legibility.evidence: Text and numbers are readable, though trace logs are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial auditing and collaborative modeling workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately reflects the direct relationship between user action and trace log.

observedEvidence: Version bump from v1 to v2

defects.observed: The variance value '+20.5%' appears instantly without typing or cursor focus indicators.
defects.fix: Add a brief hover or focus state to make the manual edit action more natural.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Manually edit spreadsheet cells to instantly update the version history and collaboration trace.
